pullRequest.title: Deepen assistant turn runner
pullRequest.body: Extracts assistant turn runner lifecycle architecture from AssistantService. The runner owns one assistant turn of agent runtime work, stream persistence, tool setup, cancellation, and service boundary behavior.
pullRequest.author: Jonksar

pullRequest.title: Todo System
pullRequest.body: Adds a TODO system for the OpenCode terminal agent, similar to Claude Code and Amp agents, so coding tasks can track local steps and progress.
pullRequest.author: wolfgangmeyers

pullRequest.title: [codex] add process-owned code-mode session client
pullRequest.body: Adds process-owned code-mode sessions, supervised child-process transport, delegate lifecycle validation, cancellation-safe ownership handoff, and durable cleanup for long-lived coding sessions.
pullRequest.author: cconger

pullRequest.title: docs(content): add ToolLoopAgent testing examples
pullRequest.body: Adds ToolLoopAgent testing examples for generate and stream. The docs show MockLanguageModel usage, simulateReadableStream, result.consumeStream, and testing examples for agent tool loop behavior.
pullRequest.author: smorchj

pullRequest.title: fix: show local agent config names
pullRequest.body: Initializes local agent profile titles from YAML name fields. Keeps filename fallback for invalid YAML configs so the profile selector remains usable.
pullRequest.author: mturac

pullRequest.title: docs: add installation guides for Zed and OpenCode
pullRequest.body: Adds MCP installation guides for Zed and OpenCode host applications. Covers remote server config, local Docker config, opencode mcp list, tool gating, and host-specific setup.
pullRequest.author: jluocsa

pullRequest.title: feat(core,server,client): re-pin spec to f68d864a; wire SubscriptionsListenResult (#2953)
pullRequest.body: Re-pins the MCP spec checkout and wires SubscriptionsListenResult. Covers stream teardown, subscription metadata, client and server tests, and conformance baselines.
pullRequest.author: felixweinberger

pullRequest.title: test(vacuum): cover VACUUM INTO for arrays and vector64
pullRequest.body: Adds integration tests for VACUUM INTO preserving vector64 blobs, vector_distance_cos behavior, arrays, text arrays, integer arrays, and multidim arrays.
pullRequest.author: f4rkh4d

pullRequest.title: fix(openai): preserve reasoning_content in assistant message serialization
pullRequest.body: Preserves reasoning_content in assistant message serialization for DeepSeek tool-calling loops so follow-up API turns keep the required reasoning payload.
pullRequest.author: SapphireSmith

pullRequest.title: fix(qdrant): fix pre-filter mapping and ingestion loop bug (#2035)
pullRequest.body: Fixes Qdrant metadata filter mapping, pre-filter behavior, ingestion batching, numeric IN filters, and vector store compatibility for retrieval pipelines.
pullRequest.author: himanshumiisshra
